critical_code_review_comments: sales_reports.py: generate_excel_report() and generate_tally_xml() methods correctly implemented with proper Excel formatting and Tally XML structure
server.py (lines 18823-18956): Export endpoints correctly call sales_reports_system methods with proper parameters
POSPage.js: Variable scope bug fixed - 'settings' variable now defined at correct position in both handlePrint() and handleDownloadPDF()

success_rate.frontend: 100% - POS page loads without errors, variable scope fix verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Export functionality fully tested and working. Excel export supports multiple payment type filters (all, cash, credit, upi, card, bank_transfer) with date range. Tally XML export generates valid Tally-compatible voucher format. POS page variable scope bug (settings used before definition) has been fixed in both handlePrint() and handleDownloadPDF() functions.
rca_of_the_issue: The '1PENDING SALE' bug was caused by the 'settings' variable being used in handleDownloadPDF() before it was defined. The fix moved 'const settings = invoiceSettings || {}' to the top of the function body (after the early return check) so it's defined before any use.
